title: stenolobium arboreum
intro: Stenolobium arboreum, also known as the Cannonball Tree, is a tropical plant native to the rainforests of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stenolobium arboreum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against various infections. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
